name: Fnaf Secret Of The Mimic
description: Step back into the terrifying world of Five Nights at Freddy’s in FNAF: Secret of The Mimic! It’s a chilling mix of logic, escape, and horror adventure that will test your nerves and your wits! You’re trapped inside a dark, abandoned pizzeria where something far worse than Freddy lurks in the shadows - The Mimic.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
